title: CatGPT brings sassy webcomics to Discord
summary:
A massive day for the ecosystem with a sassy comic-generating Discord cat, game UI polish, and six new community apps hitting the showcase.

voodoohop dropped a new Discord bot into the directory. It uses Claude for witty banter and nanobanana to generate custom comic strips featuring your avatar interacting with a sassy AI cat. Because the internet's ultimate destiny is always cats.

Community contributor ChunkyPanda29 shipped a pair of PRs to polish the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator challenge. They fixed itch.io deployment quirks and wired up responsive Lottie-based floor animations that actually scale correctly when you resize your browser.

Six new community projects just landed in the showcase. The ecosystem is getting weird and wonderful: we've got a WhatsApp assistant (Soy Cosmo), an AI RPG engine, a language learning tool (Vocamax), a recipe visualizer, and a couple of new Discord bots. People are building wild things with simple HTTP calls.
